meaning: n.希泰族,希泰语adj.希泰族的
examples: Then say thou, Thy servant Uriah the Hittite is dead also.
The Hittite king sends one of his sons, but he dies before reaching Egypt.
And one said, is not this Bathsheba, the daughter of Eliam, the wife of Uriah the Hittite?
Hittite Microwave, a maker of integrated circuits and other high-tech devices, has enjoyed a steady increase in EPS for the last five years, carries no debt and has had strong earnings growth.
